text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, King! What is up? Laying eyes on
thine splendid visage today hath verily lifted
my vibes!!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Um, Kawakami? You sound different today…

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh! I'm absolutely delighted you noticed!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
In my quest to become more refined, I have
gained new knowledge from the internet!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I wanted thee to be the first to witness my
linguistic glow-up! Hehe!♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Right. How about I give you some lessons?
First, we'll learn how to choose the right
diction.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yes, please! That would be indubitably fire♪
